cl.m: Marked abandoned: Hidden by author Jan 2025: not supported, has unfixed issues
Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Allows summoned creatures to reveal the fog of war as they move, giving the player visibility through their summons' line of sight.
no: Allows summoned creatures to reveal the fog of war as they move, giving the player visibility through their summons' line of sight.

co.n: Summons and charmed creatures clear fog of war
Summons (but NOT charmed creatures) follow through area changes.
